title: RapidMeta Ophthalmology | Avacincaptad Pegol (C5 Inhibitor) for Geographic Atrophy v1.0
hero_h2: Avacincaptad Pegol in Geographic Atrophy Secondary to AMD

pico.pop: Adults with geographic atrophy secondary to age-related macular degeneration
pico.int: Avacincaptad pegol 2 mg intravitreal monthly (anti-C5 PEGylated aptamer)
pico.out: Mean rate of change in GA lesion area at month 12 (sqrt-transformed mm; Khanani 2023 Lancet)
pico.subgroup: Subfoveal vs extrafoveal GA, baseline GA area, lesion configuration

real_data_entries.name: GATHER-1
real_data_entries.group: GA secondary to AMD, avacincaptad pegol 2 mg IVT monthly vs sham (12-mo GA growth rate sqrt-mm MD)

allOutcomes.title: GA lesion area growth rate at month 12 (sqrt mm, MD vs sham; primary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Khanani AM et al. Lancet 2023;402:1432-1443 (GATHER-1).

real_data_entries.name: GATHER-2
real_data_entries.group: GA secondary to AMD, avacincaptad pegol 2 mg IVT monthly vs sham (12-mo GA growth rate sqrt-mm MD; replicate pivotal)

allOutcomes.title: GA lesion area growth rate at month 12 (sqrt mm, MD vs sham; primary, replicate)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Khanani AM et al. Lancet 2023;402:1432-1443 (GATHER-2, replicate pivotal).
